_comment: Pointer chains for HEAT memory mod API. Each entry maps a friendly name to a module + offsets.
_howto: To populate: find base pointer in CE, copy module+offset chain here, then restart overlay.

multiplayer_hud_score._note: Returns the scoreboard score, not agent skill

multiplayer_hud_rangefinder._note: Returns the rangefinder displayed in multiplayer HUD when aiming at a target

multiplayer_camera_zoom._note: Returns camera zoom level for both 3rd and first person views. values between 0-4 are 3rd person values, it then wraps to 0 when transitioning to first person zoom, value then increses depending on hom many zoom stages the vehicle has

training_vehicle_energy._note: Returns vehicle energy value in training range

training_vehicle_rangefinder._note: Returns rangefinder value in training range
